H2: Perforated Window Decal FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Perforated Window Decals

Professional Storefront Displays & Privacy Solutions

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Design Your Custom Perforated Window Decals Choose Size & Options Upload Your Design Add to Cart Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Perforated Window Decals for Business & Retail

Transform your storefront windows with custom perforated window decals that provide one-way visibility and professional advertising. Our perforated window decals feature tiny holes that allow customers inside to see out clearly while displaying your graphics, logos, and promotional messages to people outside. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Perfect for retail stores, restaurants, offices, and commercial spaces, these perforated window decals create eye-catching displays without blocking natural light or obstructing interior views. The perforated vinyl material adheres securely to glass surfaces and removes cleanly when needed.

Available in custom sizes up to large format dimensions, our perforated window decals are printed with vibrant, fade-resistant inks that maintain their appearance in direct sunlight. Choose from our easy online design tools or upload your own artwork for professional results.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Your Custom Perforated Window Decals

Creating your custom perforated window decals is straightforward with our streamlined design and ordering process. Start by selecting your desired size and quantity, then choose between designing online or uploading your own artwork file.

Design Process

Use our intuitive online designer to create perforated window decals from scratch. Upload images or logos from your computer, or select from our extensive clipart library to build your custom design. For professional results, upload a print-ready .eps file that ensures maximum quality for your perforated window decals.

Once you add your perforated window decals to your cart and select shipping options, we'll email you a digital proof for approval. This proof shows exactly how your perforated window decals will look before production begins.

Payment

All perforated window decals require full payment before production starts. We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards, plus checks that must be received before your perforated window decals enter production.

Live Order Tracking

Monitor your perforated window decal order from placement to delivery with our Live Order Tracking system. You'll receive a unique tracking number via email that provides real-time updates on your order's progress through every stage of our production process.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Perforated Window Decal Production & Turnaround Times

Choose from flexible production timeframes ranging from one to five business days for your perforated window decals. Production timing starts once your artwork upload is complete and approved, not including shipping time to your location.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Get your perforated window decals fast with our priority one-day turnaround. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the next business day. Emergency same-day production may be available in special cases - contact our customer service team for availability.

2 Business Day Express Production

Our express production option delivers your perforated window decals in two business days, perfect when you need quality results quickly. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST start production the following business day.

3 Business Day Standard Production

This popular production timeframe offers the ideal balance of speed and value for most perforated window decal orders. Standard production is included at no additional cost with most orders.

5 Business Day Saver Production

Save money on your perforated window decal order by choosing our most economical production timeline. Perfect when you're planning ahead and don't need rush delivery.

All production times exclude shipping duration. If your order requires prepress review or proof approval, production timing begins when we receive your approval, not when the order is initially placed.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Die-Cut Perforated Window Decals

Our perforated window decals are available with precise die-cutting that shapes your decals to match your design exactly. This cutting method removes excess material around your graphics for clean, professional results.

Die-Cut Perforated Window Decals

Die-cutting (also called contour cutting) cuts through both the perforated vinyl material and paper backing, leaving no excess material around your design. Think of it like a cookie cutter - your perforated window decals are individually cut to follow the exact outline of your artwork.

This cutting method creates individually shaped perforated window decals without background material, perfect for logos, text, and custom shapes that need to stand out on your storefront windows. Each decal peels away cleanly from the backing for easy installation.

Back slit (crack and peel) options are available with standard and permanent adhesive materials, making removal of individual perforated window decals simple during installation on large windows.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Perforated Window Decal Artwork Requirements

Submitting proper artwork ensures your perforated window decals print with sharp detail and vibrant colors. We accept various file formats with specific requirements for optimal results.

Preferred File Types

For the best quality perforated window decals, submit vector-based files: Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated PostScript) or PDF formats. Maximum file size accepted is 100 MB. Convert all fonts to outlines or curves to prevent font substitution issues during printing.

Additional File Formats

We also accept high-resolution raster files: JPG, TIFF, and PNG formats. These work well for photographic elements in your perforated window decal designs but require proper resolution for crisp printing.

File Setup Guidelines

Set up your artwork proportionate to your ordered perforated window decal size. Convert all text to outlines, allow for bleed only when necessary, and indicate cut lines clearly. For raster images, follow these resolution guidelines: 100% scale at 100 dpi, 50% scale at 200+ dpi, 25% scale at 300+ dpi, or 10% scale at 600-1200 dpi.

Design Services

If you need artwork created or improved, our vectorizing service can recreate logos and images starting at $15. More detailed graphics may require custom quoting. This service requires advance payment and we keep your recreated vector artwork on file for future perforated window decal orders.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Perforated Window Decal Shipping & Delivery

Your perforated window decals ship separately from production time, so factor both production and shipping duration into your timeline. We offer multiple shipping speeds to meet your project deadlines.

Shipping Methods

Choose from ground shipping, expedited options, and overnight delivery for your perforated window decals. Ground shipping typically takes 3-7 business days depending on your location, while expedited services can deliver your perforated window decals in 1-3 business days.

Shipping Time Expectations

Shipping time starts after your perforated window decals complete production. For example, if you select 3-day production plus 2-day shipping, expect delivery approximately 5 business days from order approval. Weekend days don't count toward business day calculations.

Important Shipping Notes

Large perforated window decals may require freight shipping depending on dimensions. Economy shipping options may take longer during peak seasons. We provide tracking information for all perforated window decal shipments so you can monitor delivery progress.

International shipping is available for perforated window decals with extended delivery times and potential customs requirements in the destination country.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Installing Your Perforated Window Decals

Proper installation ensures your perforated window decals adhere smoothly and last for years on your storefront windows. Follow these steps for professional results that maximize visibility and durability.

Preparing the Surface

Clean your window thoroughly with glass cleaner and lint-free cloths before applying perforated window decals. Remove all dirt, dust, and residue that could prevent proper adhesion. Allow the surface to dry completely before starting installation.

Applying Perforated Window Decals

Position your perforated window decals carefully before removing the backing paper. Start from one edge and gradually smooth the decal onto the glass surface, working out air bubbles with a squeegee or application tool. The perforated material allows some air to escape through the tiny holes.

Finishing Installation

Press firmly along all edges of your perforated window decals to ensure complete adhesion. Small air bubbles often disappear naturally within 24-48 hours due to the perforated vinyl's structure. For larger bubbles, use a pin to create a small hole and smooth out the trapped air.

Your installed perforated window decals provide excellent visibility from inside while displaying your graphics clearly to exterior viewers. The perforations allow natural light to enter while maintaining your promotional message's impact.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Perforated Window Decals?

Perforated window decals are specialty vinyl graphics with tiny holes that create one-way visibility for storefront applications. The perforated vinyl material displays full-color graphics when viewed from outside while allowing clear visibility from inside through the microscopic perforations. This unique material combines advertising effectiveness with practical functionality for retail and commercial spaces.

Design Your Professional Perforated Window Decals Today

Create impressive storefront displays that attract customers while maintaining interior visibility with our custom perforated window decals. Perfect for retail stores, restaurants, offices, and any business wanting to maximize window advertising space without sacrificing natural light or outward views.

Our perforated window decals print in vibrant, fade-resistant colors that maintain their appearance in direct sunlight. Choose from standard sizes or request custom dimensions to fit your specific windows. With fast production times and reliable shipping, your custom hard hat stickers and other promotional materials can coordinate with your window graphics for consistent branding.

Upload your artwork today or use our design tools to create perforated window decals that transform your storefront into an effective marketing tool. Professional quality printing and durable materials ensure your investment delivers long-lasting results that enhance your business visibility.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Perforated Window Decal FAQs

What material is used for perforated window decals?

Perforated window decals are made from specialized vinyl material with tiny holes that allow one-way visibility. The perforated vinyl provides excellent print quality while maintaining see-through properties from the inside, making it ideal for storefront windows and commercial applications.

Can perforated window decals be repositioned after installation?

Perforated window decals are designed for permanent installation and cannot be easily repositioned once applied to glass surfaces. The adhesive creates a strong bond with the window for long-term durability, so careful positioning during initial installation is important.

Are perforated window decals applied inside or outside the window?

Perforated window decals are typically applied to the exterior surface of windows for best visibility and weather resistance. Exterior application allows the graphics to face outward toward potential customers while the perforations provide clear visibility from inside your business.

How large can custom perforated window decals be made?

Custom perforated window decals can be produced in large format sizes to cover entire storefront windows. Maximum dimensions depend on your specific requirements, and our production team can create perforated window decals sized to fit standard commercial windows or custom architectural features.

What are common uses for perforated window decals?

Common applications include retail store promotions, restaurant menu displays, office privacy graphics, and commercial building signage. Perforated window decals work well for any business wanting to advertise while maintaining natural light and interior-to-exterior visibility.

Do perforated window decals damage glass when removed?

Properly manufactured perforated window decals remove cleanly from glass surfaces without leaving residue or causing damage. The adhesive is formulated to bond securely during use but allow clean removal when replacement is needed, though some gentle heat application may help during removal.

How long do perforated window decals last outdoors?

High-quality perforated window decals typically last 3-5 years in outdoor applications when properly installed and maintained. UV-resistant inks and durable vinyl materials help perforated window decals withstand sun exposure, weather conditions, and normal wear in commercial environments.
